column1: # SIMPLIFIED extract of OMIM's disease->gene relationships, in the same spirit
# as OMIM's downloadable files genemap2.txt / morbidmap.txt.
# HOW TO GET THE REAL / FULL FILE:
#   3. Public MIM number -> NCBI Entrez GeneID map:
#   load_omim() can be pointed at the real file; only column indices change.
# WHY IT MATTERS: OMIM adds curated disease->gene edges that confirm/expand CTD
# and lets you resolve a disease given AS AN OMIM NUMBER (e.g. 607822 = AD3).
# GeneID = NCBI Entrez Gene ID, so this JOINS directly to the CTD file and to
